meaning: n.收敛剂adj.收敛性的,严酷的,涩的
examples: Green tea is too astringent to use for tea eggs.
The rose, Marla tells me, is a natural astringent.
And sawdust and filbert husks to make red wine more astringent.
The bar remains rich but not overwhelmingly dark and fruity but not astringent.
Robert Sussman, who leads the transition's Environmental Protection Agency "review team, " has been an astringent critic of Mr. Dingell on carbon regulation.
